name: quantum solar panel
description: This solar panel is obviously cutting-edge technology and given where you found it, it should probably provide a LOT of power.  It's covered in strange-looking material, but the covering looks rather fragile; it doesn't look like it could support a reinforcing sheet, either.

A quantum solar panel covered with a pane of reinforced glass to protect the delicate exotic photovoltaic layer.  The glass causes this panel to produce slightly less power than a normal quantum panel.

//: Four quantum solar panels stuck together for 1 m x 1 m area
description: A collection of four quantum solar panels, ready to convert solar radiation into electric power with exotic photovoltaic materials.

//: Four reinforced quantum solar panels stuck together for 1 m x 1 m area
description: A collection of four reinforced quantum solar panels, ready to provide static-grid power while better protected from impact damage.
A small, portable plutonium reactor.  Handle with great care!
